title: 'Ashk@naz #0813
definition:
Ashchenaz or Ashkenaz = "a man as sprinkled: fire as scattered"

 1) a descendant of Japheth
 2) a northern people, perhaps of Bithynia
nasbUsage:
Definition: Ashchenaz or Ashkenaz = "a man as sprinkled: fire as scattered"

 1) a descendant of Japheth
 2) a northern people, perhaps of Bithynia

    NASB:  a son of Gomer, also his desc. and their land
